title: 日経新春杯の後に・急襲！新ライバル

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto finishes the race with good results.
By my analysis, not only is she performing well,
she's showing she can hold her own in her
senior-year graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Matikanefukukitaru thwarts our eager
procession toward the spring G1. Our next goal,
and preliminary for the G1, becomes the Kinko
Sho.
